caption: Fig. 3. Average accuracy during training on EMNIST-Dir(0.3) using either Avg or GeoMed as the model aggregation step and without filtering. The case without SL is labeled as Avg, γ = 0. We vary the value of ηg ∈ {1, 2} when using SL with γ = 0.1. Shaded areas represent min-max values over 3 runs.

description3: Three multi-panel plots display line charts showing average accuracy versus round, with shaded min-max ranges over three runs.
